name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or API you would like. If it affects hosting (ASP.NET Core vs desktop), call that out explicitly.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why this one fits best.

## Additional context

Mockups, references to similar tools, or links to standards (for example GeoJSON-related specs) if relevant.
